holdings.infoBox: FEX is an equity ETF with a total of 378 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 1.28%, Micron Technology at 1.25%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 1.01%, Marvell Technology at 0.97%, and Dell Technologies at 0.96%.

overview.description: The First Trust Large Cap Core AlphaDEX Fund (FEX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Large Cap Core index. The fund tracks a tiered equal-weighted index of large-cap stocks selected from the S&P 500 based on the S&P's AlphaDex selection methodology. FEX was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX Large Cap Core Index
